channel.title: XMLUI Blog
channel.description: Latest updates, tutorials, and insights for XMLUI - the declarative UI framework. Stay informed about new features, best practices, and community highlights.

item.title: Semantic tracing: how ARIA unlocks debugging, testing, and AI reasoning
item.description: AI tools are writing more code than ever, and that code is a liability. The more you ship, the more you need to know: did our change break something? What exactly happens when a user clicks that button? For reactive web apps, these questions are espe...
item.author: support@xmlui.org (Jon Udell)

item.title: Improving the XMLUI MCP server
item.description: Here's a review of the XMLUI MCP server written by one of its primary users, Claude Code. <blockquote> The xmlui-mcp is genuinely useful. For understanding an XMLUI app, the combination of xmlui_component_docs (API reference), xmlui_search_howto (tas...
item.author: support@xmlui.org (Jon Udell)

item.title: Introducing the XMLUI CLI
item.description: To try XMLUI frictionlessly you can run and modify demo apps online: xmlui-hello-world, xmlui-weather. But if you use one of these as a springboard for your own app you'll want to download and run locally. For that you'll need a minimal static web se...
item.author: support@xmlui.org (Jon Udell)

item.title: An XMLUI-powered blog
item.description: In this post we'll explore the development of the blog engine we're using on this site. Our tagline is Practical User Interfaces Built Simply and creating this blog couldn't have been simpler. It's an XMLUI app built with a handful of core components...
item.author: support@xmlui.org (Jon Udell)

item.title: Introducing XMLUI
item.description: > [!TIP] > Ed. note: This is the post that was discussed on Hacker News. In the mid-1990s you could create useful software without being an ace coder. You had Visual Basic, you had a rich ecosystem of components, you could wire them together to creat...
item.author: support@xmlui.org (Jon Udell)

item.title: Supabase + XMLUI
item.description: Supabase provides a powerful backend: Postgres database, authentication, real-time subscriptions, storage, and edge functions. But building a frontend typically means setting up a build system, managing dependencies, and writing lots of boilerplate....
item.author: support@xmlui.org (Jon Udell)

item.title: Reproducible XMLUI
item.description: The XMLUI docs are full of live working examples that use Playground, an extension package that runs XMLUI code inside an XMLUI app. We use playgrounds to bring component documentation to life. Why just tell you about the enabled property of a Checkb...
item.author: support@xmlui.org (Jon Udell)
